title: lippia fissicalyx
intro: Lippia fissicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lippia fissicalyx include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lippia fissicalyx can be found in tea form, where the leaves are infused in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
